## About You

**Name / GitHub handle:**

**Domain(s) you can review:**

**Your background in this domain:**

**Public work or credentials (optional):**
<!-- Links to papers, published work, profiles, or anything that gives context. Not required — we take people at their word. -->

---

## What You're Signing Up For

- You'll be tagged on PRs when a module in your domain is submitted
- You have **14 days** to complete a review or decline
- Declining is always fine — just let us know so we can invite someone else
- No minimum commitment. Review when you have capacity.

**I understand and agree:** [ ]

---

## Languages You Can Review In

- [ ] English
- [ ] Chinese (Simplified)
- [ ] Chinese (Traditional)
- [ ] Other: ___________

---

*Maintainers will add you to REVIEWERS.md and tag you on relevant PRs. Usually within a week.*
